When working on website style extraction, transfer, or reconstruction in this repository, read `SKILL.md` and use the portable CLI or MCP tools. Do not depend on a vendor-specific browser plugin. For style work, keep deterministic `style-profile.json` separate from Agent-authored `STYLE.md`, cite evidence and confidence, enforce retain/reinterpret/replace boundaries, render `style-board.html`, and run `html2style skill` to deliver a reusable design-style Skill with an HTML preview. For complete replicas, read `references/high-fidelity-reconstruction.md`, preserve complete-page scope, keep owner/rendered/intrinsic image geometry separate, and run asset and evidence audits.
